title: Connect All Boards to Dashboard

posts.author: jallen6 (Jessica)
posts.cookedHtml: The Connect Board to a dashboard function. Create the ability to connect all existing team boards or boards in a workspace to a dashboard. Specifically for a team workload dashboard. A way to automatically connect newly created boards to dashboard views rather than having to search and single select boards. This should include the ability to search for boards by person/owner and add them.
